name: Document Extraction
description: Extracting structured data from claims documents

content.title: Document Extraction: From Unstructured to Structured
content.content:
# Document Extraction: From Unstructured to Structured

## Supported Document Types

| Document Type | Key Fields | Output |
|---------------|------------|--------|
| **Precautionary Loss Advice (Prec)** | Loss date, cedent, contract, reserve amount, event description | Claim draft record |
| **Claims Advice** | Claim number, paid/reserved amounts, loss details | Claim update |
| **Statement of Account (StoA)** | Balances, transactions, period | Financial reconciliation |
| **Loss Bordereau** | Multiple claim records, aggregates | Batch claim entries |

## Extraction Pipeline

### Step 1: Content Extraction
- **PDF Attachments**: OCR / Document AI for text extraction
- **Excel Attachments**: Content parsing for tables and fields
- **Scanned Images**: OCR with quality checks

### Step 2: Schema Mapping
- Load Claim Data Model with field definitions
- Load Dimensions (Cedent, Contract, LoB)
- Load Validation Rules
- Map extracted content to target schema

### Step 3: Output Generation
- **Structured Claim Record**: Ready for claims system
- **Items for Review**: Fields requiring human validation
- **Confidence Scores**: Extraction confidence per field

## Field Mapping Guidance

Each field includes synonyms and extraction hints:

| Field | Synonyms | Extraction Hints |
|-------|----------|------------------|
| **ClaimNumber** | Claim #, Claim Ref, Reference No. | Usually in header or reference section |
| **LossDate** | Date of Loss, DOL, Occurrence Date | Date format varies by region |
| **PaidAmount** | Paid, Payment, Settled | Look for currency indicators |
| **ReservedAmount** | Reserve, O/S Reserve, Outstanding | May be gross or net |
| **CedentId** | Cedent, Ceding Company, Client | Match against master data |

## Validation Checks

- **Completeness**: Required fields present
- **Range validation**: Values within expected bounds
- **Referential integrity**: Cedent ID exists in master
- **Business rules**: Domain-specific logic
- **Consistency**: Cross-field validation
